title: Retractions registry consolidation (26 retractions -> single canonical file)
summary: Consolidated every retraction, falsification, deprecation, and honest non-reproduction from RANKED_FINDINGS.md S5, PAPER.md S5, CHANGELOG.md (v7.6 + v7.7), and ULTIMATE_SCORECARD.md into a single 46-entry canonical registry at docs/RETRACTIONS_REGISTRY.md. The original 'NO single canonical file' gap is closed.

inputs.changelog: CHANGELOG.md (v7.6 + v7.7 entries; 4 new paper-grade retractions in v7.7)
inputs.scorecard: results/ULTIMATE_SCORECARD.md (DEPRECATED / FALSIFIED / NOT REPRODUCED verdict rows)
inputs.paper_appendix_a: docs/PAPER.md Appendix A item 16 (v7.6 VL_CV_FLOOR methodological-leak disclosure)

outputs.project_map_patch: PROJECT_MAP.md - added docs-level integrity-artefact row + updated Q&A row from stale '25-item list' to new 46-entry registry

reconciliation_notes.ranked_finding_5_vs_changelog_v77: RANKED_FINDINGS S5 had the canonical 26-item list. CHANGELOG v7.7 added 5 new entries, of which 1 (golden-ratio phi-fraction) was already retraction #1 in RANKED S5. Net new: 4 (R27-R30: adjacent-verse anti-repetition, ring composition, small-world topology, prime-number signature).
reconciliation_notes.paper_section_5_additions: PAPER S5 adds 5 EXPLORATORY downgrades (R31-R35: L1/L3/L4/L6/L7) from the 2026-04-20 external review, and 4 scope/mechanism disclosures (R36-R40: E1, R5 G4, char-root GAP, Adiyat epsilon->ghayn, Phi_sym) - these did NOT appear in RANKED S5.
reconciliation_notes.ultimate_scorecard_deprecations: ULTIMATE_SCORECARD lists DEPRECATED verdicts on D02, D06, D27, D28, S1 (all variants of biased multivariate separation d) and FALSIFIED on D05 unit-level I(EL;CN). Consolidated as R41-R44 in registry.
reconciliation_notes.historical_v2_retraction: D18 adjacent-diversity 100% is explicitly mentioned in PAPER S5 as a preserved v2 retraction (R45).

methodological_leak_disclosure.description: VL_CV_FLOOR = 0.1962 in archived build_pipeline_p1.py (pre-5-D). Inflated control separation by +0.36 pp under legacy OR-rule. Active 5-D pipeline (src/clean_pipeline.py) does NOT use this floor; locked scalars in results_lock.json are unaffected.

planned: docs/RETRACTIONS_REGISTRY.md with summary table + per-entry details
1-line pointer in PROJECT_MAP.md under integrity locks
delivered: docs/RETRACTIONS_REGISTRY.md: 46 entries in summary table, 7 category-grouped detail sections, usage notes, scoreboard
PROJECT_MAP.md: added docs-level integrity-artefact row under section 4 + updated Q&A row in section 5 to point to the new registry

notes: Re-opening protocol for any entry in this registry requires fresh data, pre-registered null hypothesis, PR to the registry, and verdict logged as a new row with [REOPENED] prefix. Never silently overwrite. Retraction IDs are stable; do not renumber.
